ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., Driver DUP, Firmware DUP) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., Chipset, Network / RDMA) */,
  "dell_part_number" TEXT /* Dell part number for the component */,
  "software_bundle" TEXT /* Software bundle associated with the component */,
  "supported_version" TEXT /* Supported version of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date of the component */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, decommissioned, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "component_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first component */,
  "component_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second component */,
  "is_compatible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the components are compatible */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the compatibility */,
  "compatibility_type" TEXT /* Type of compatibility (e.g., hardware, software, firmware) */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* User who tested the compatibility */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the compatibility was tested */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the compatibility was tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_component_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_1") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_component_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_2") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_history" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who performed the update */,
  "previous_version" TEXT /* Previous version of the component */,
  "current_version" TEXT /* Current version of the component */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., bug fix, feature update, security patch) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made */,
  "rollback_possible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the update can be rolled back */,
  "rollback_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for rolling back the update if needed */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the impact of the update on the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, support) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
